summary: Delete a resource from a Copilot Space for a user
description:
Deletes a resource from a specific Copilot Space owned by a user.
The authenticated user must have write permissions on the space.

OAuth app tokens and personal access tokens (classic) need the `write:user` scope to use this endpoint.

parameters.name: space_number
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the Copilot Space.

parameters.name: space_resource_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the resource.
